dict.string: AI Matrx uses your microphone to record audio, transcribe speech locally using Whisper, and to invoke audio-related AI tools. Audio is processed on-device and never uploaded without your explicit action.

AI Matrx can use your camera to capture images for AI vision tools and document scanning. Captured images are processed locally and are not transmitted externally unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.

AI Matrx uses screen recording to capture screenshots for the Screenshot tool and to enable AI-assisted automation workflows. Captured content is only used when you invoke a screenshot or automation tool.
AI Matrx can read your contacts when you use contact-related AI tools. Contact data is processed locally and is not sent to external servers unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
AI Matrx can read and create calendar events when you use calendar AI tools. Calendar data is processed locally and is not sent to external servers unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
AI Matrx can read and create reminders when you use reminder AI tools. Data is processed locally and is not sent externally unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
AI Matrx can access your photo library when you use image AI tools. Photos are processed locally and are not uploaded unless you explicitly invoke a cloud AI tool.
AI Matrx can access your location when you use location-aware AI tools. Location data is only used for the tool you explicitly invoke and is not stored or transmitted without your consent.
AI Matrx accesses your location only while the app is in the foreground and only when you invoke a location tool.
AI Matrx uses Bluetooth to discover nearby devices and report connected Bluetooth hardware when you use the Bluetooth discovery tools.
AI Matrx browses your local network to discover devices and services when you use network discovery AI tools.
AI Matrx can use Apple's speech recognition for voice-to-text when the local Whisper model is not available.
AI Matrx can integrate with Siri to enable voice-activated AI tool invocation.
AI Matrx sends Apple Events to other applications to automate keyboard input, window management, and UI interactions when you invoke automation AI tools.
